publishedAbstract: - Prometheus pods not retaining logs as per the set configuration in the configmap `user-workload-monitoring-config` and `cluster-monitoring-config` available under respective namespaces `openshift-user-workload-monitoring` and `openshift-monitoring`: ~~~ apiVersion: v1 kind: ConfigMap metadata: name: namespace: data: config.yaml: | prometheus: retention: 2h ~~~
publishedTitle: Prometheus log retention policy configuration not working
